Flat concept inventory:
- Large Language Models in Education | papers: 163b4d6a79a5b19af88b8585456363340d9efd04; 458147b5f7242c998ec4f33798a59b7c48867329; 6c943670dca38bfc7c8b477ae7c2d1fba1ad3691; a52dd1e900200e0733eea927edc7d6c27aeba187; b272513916b45c8517d289d7abee4a53e6832187; a03bdcf22b137ba220f0508768a5f3b4ff374bcd; d697b440dd0e65a05fe027e4c0ea85f62dcba033; a5036f31f0e629dc661f120b8c3b1f374d479ab8; d3135733aa39dec20ce72aa138589dda27c8406d; 170c97c7215f42edfb20c2248f954879e91ef86e; 5dcd4581c979bc97b165a1e2d55cc434d9136351; 5e761e9f5cd9672a181b256299cd2916a8079461; ab4467bd55ddfe7b575aad37df11720ec93965d6; 62176de125738e3b95850d1227bac81fd646b78e; 3f758a13d3703b02bdf977f9189230276064da42; 1b6e810ce0afd0dd093f789d2b2742d047e316d5; 83edcfbb206ddad38a971d605da09390604248ea; 5dea206e2a36e672f197252bdd27d156d058f48c; 99bd07e888476904c6dd77ca154fd48629ac6dce; 90350aa626bed47b02d0c162462e5b0ca82be6b2; 89689059d0cdcb52d7fbb6007ab953db22936a90; 261549439aebdda72b648ecc462448fd24857ac1; 5437e8adab596d7294124c0e798708e050e25321; 6f0bfec3a245f1aa203d16469ec313f2eb02e028; c6808575096a6e4f3cbdc5f893384bc5a01cc6f8; 9e3c493fb09dcd61bb05e8c5659f23327b7b6340; e08c1e013681c82a65dd971bfd86d5ae4b48318f; 93d6fa92d60938b5bd0e405e159832b91332f169; e74dee333546d9ad1a611a18fb0d5fa82980c006; ce8de3902a583e1eb6062d4453ed90fe6b9d4558; 70246c500293edd3c0dbf88319d28e1ee802ec81; c66271363c88407edc335fc9a314c7a0e0af38c1; c63f92f5598f72e214291e54cacda43eaf26c04c; b1fe92f5992b141a3587fa5c180997d4b59d5811; fa48230b530edff0982db2f1ba093990dbc0ced9; a2bf0f9d41c550bc7cf69706b322f9c9838d3b00; 9cac09098aa611bd9a94d080d2401840632ab16f; d8381a42402f7f74e69ec1fe6e8ba7999b0ba9c2; a3ff4df653b6970898c04e6b768e58b99786d073; 26117c6b7cc75ba0afaf09bf4544cb0c58ea8bfd; a729c0385245568a9beb080a03c7299b648261d3; 06c8d72a9381829251d4eb99518666694633ab80; e0ff5f0a1cfe6c66d903f8b6afb46a673b4f97ad; 073e6b91adc25c656d85002e3cb059e4530db20b; c15e1536111e080355eb4782f4d04b78a6be1139; 7397f9861a3c8110540a0ca55072d3d6ea54cba5; 850e07b5811049ad02f80d4bd3c99ea1a619e18e; 1d193beaae32bf38866f62c5da22f7e4955c2d4d; bc6ad001c395e92920839e45dfd7e05ce69405d2; 0ba49945649b40f205503dba3443e2bf550c7115; 783dead4fd1aa29ee019a2f324e859a6b3dcb332; a59450f279441aa1a9ca2a03cd2ba234f539a1cb; 6c16ffcdd208f0dbbbb30bfb518d9214befe6804; e1b2b1a20a8ca7cdafc9c0aa8c5f95590db98acc; ce630c477b8af157a8b671736d29007d212d9574; cafa434099e11a348cd4351e7d4093f0c511821c; 61dd97603fe7ec08fd9970ccf19fd3c9332bea10; 0a9b7f2ff0e25f4eecd946bae4ad2f8c2d53b562; 0a12e21a6efb66a7a24aa7fcc9610c7690c58a44; - Academic Researches | papers: 163b4d6a79a5b19af88b8585456363340d9efd04; 458147b5f7242c998ec4f33798a59b7c48867329; 6c943670dca38bfc7c8b477ae7c2d1fba1ad3691; a52dd1e900200e0733eea927edc7d6c27aeba187; - Study Assisting | papers: 163b4d6a79a5b19af88b8585456363340d9efd04; 458147b5f7242c998ec4f33798a59b7c48867329; 6c943670dca38bfc7c8b477ae7c2d1fba1ad3691; a52dd1e900200e0733eea927edc7d6c27aeba187; b272513916b45c8517d289d7abee4a53e6832187; a03bdcf22b137ba220f0508768a5f3b4ff374bcd; d697b440dd0e65a05fe027e4c0ea85f62dcba033; a5036f31f0e629dc661f120b8c3b1f374d479ab8; d3135733aa39dec20ce72aa138589dda27c8406d; 170c97c7215f42edfb20c2248f954879e91ef86e; 5dcd4581c979bc97b165a1e2d55cc434d9136351; 5e761e9f5cd9672a181b256299cd2916a8079461; ab4467bd55ddfe7b575aad37df11720ec93965d6; 62176de125738e3b95850d1227bac81fd646b78e; 3f758a13d3703b02bdf977f9189230276064da42; 1b6e810ce0afd0dd093f789d2b2742d047e316d5; 83edcfbb206ddad38a971d605da09390604248ea; 5dea206e2a36e672f197252bdd27d156d058f48c; 99bd07e888476904c6dd77ca154fd48629ac6dce; 90350aa626bed47b02d0c162462e5b0ca82be6b2; 89689059d0cdcb52d7fbb6007ab953db22936a90; 261549439aebdda72b648ecc462448fd24857ac1; 5437e8adab596d7294124c0e798708e050e25321; 6f0bfec3a245f1aa203d16469ec313f2eb02e028; c6808575096a6e4f3cbdc5f893384bc5a01cc6f8; 9e3c493fb09dcd61bb05e8c5659f23327b7b6340; e08c1e013681c82a65dd971bfd86d5ae4b48318f; 93d6fa92d60938b5bd0e405e159832b91332f169; e74dee333546d9ad1a611a18fb0d5fa82980c006; ce8de3902a583e1eb6062d4453ed90fe6b9d4558; 70246c500293edd3c0dbf88319d28e1ee802ec81; c66271363c88407edc335fc9a314c7a0e0af38c1; c63f92f5598f72e214291e54cacda43eaf26c04c; b1fe92f5992b141a3587fa5c180997d4b59d5811; 70bdb9ec87efa2b23f4a377040ad76f995c960d5; 494e2b04fbc78b4bb54f5c9baf7748a83e698b1d; 6afc41f8cf00b298f7aaa7e33719c00af3069cb3; dd22e2eb52b835f2c0abe8895b5a355c0eefda94; ab91ce3fa3ebcffb637bd48b5caeba4967d2a79d; fa48230b530edff0982db2f1ba093990dbc0ced9; a2bf0f9d41c550bc7cf69706b322f9c9838d3b00; 9cac09098aa611bd9a94d080d2401840632ab16f; d8381a42402f7f74e69ec1fe6e8ba7999b0ba9c2; a3ff4df653b6970898c04e6b768e58b99786d073; 26117c6b7cc75ba0afaf09bf4544cb0c58ea8bfd
- Question Solving (QS) | papers: 163b4d6a79a5b19af88b8585456363340d9efd04; 458147b5f7242c998ec4f33798a59b7c48867329; 6c943670dca38bfc7c8b477ae7c2d1fba1ad3691; a52dd1e900200e0733eea927edc7d6c27aeba187; b272513916b45c8517d289d7abee4a53e6832187; a03bdcf22b137ba220f0508768a5f3b4ff374bcd; d697b440dd0e65a05fe027e4c0ea85f62dcba033; a5036f31f0e629dc661f120b8c3b1f374d479ab8; d3135733aa39dec20ce72aa138589dda27c8406d; 170c97c7215f42edfb20c2248f954879e91ef86e; 5dcd4581c979bc97b165a1e2d55cc434d9136351; 5e761e9f5cd9672a181b256299cd2916a8079461; ab4467bd55ddfe7b575aad37df11720ec93965d6; 62176de125738e3b95850d1227bac81fd646b78e; 3f758a13d3703b02bdf977f9189230276064da42; 1b6e810ce0afd0dd093f789d2b2742d047e316d5; 83edcfbb206ddad38a971d605da09390604248ea; 5dea206e2a36e672f197252bdd27d156d058f48c; 99bd07e888476904c6dd77ca154fd48629ac6dce; 90350aa626bed47b02d0c162462e5b0ca82be6b2; 89689059d0cdcb52d7fbb6007ab953db22936a90; 261549439aebdda72b648ecc462448fd24857ac1; 5437e8adab596d7294124c0e798708e050e25321
- Error Correction (EC) | papers: 6f0bfec3a245f1aa203d16469ec313f2eb02e028; c6808575096a6e4f3cbdc5f893384bc5a01cc6f8; 9e3c493fb09dcd61bb05e8c5659f23327b7b6340; e08c1e013681c82a65dd971bfd86d5ae4b48318f; 93d6fa92d60938b5bd0e405e159832b91332f169; e74dee333546d9ad1a611a18fb0d5fa82980c006; ce8de3902a583e1eb6062d4453ed90fe6b9d4558; 70246c500293edd3c0dbf88319d28e1ee802ec81; c66271363c88407edc335fc9a314c7a0e0af38c1; c63f92f5598f72e214291e54cacda43eaf26c04c; b1fe92f5992b141a3587fa5c180997d4b59d5811; 70bdb9ec87efa2b23f4a377040ad76f995c960d5; 494e2b04fbc78b4bb54f5c9baf7748a83e698b1d; 6afc41f8cf00b298f7aaa7e33719c00af3069cb3; dd22e2eb52b835f2c0abe8895b5a355c0eefda94; ab91ce3fa3ebcffb637bd48b5caeba4967d2a79d; fa48230b530edff0982db2f1ba093990dbc0ced9; a2bf0f9d41c550bc7cf69706b322f9c9838d3b00; 9cac09098aa611bd9a94d080d2401840632ab16f
